<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh-yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh-yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh-yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the [[Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive]].

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by [[Yang Water Dragon]] and followed by [[Yang Wood Horse]]. In [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin-Yang Five Elements]], the [[Mizunoto (癸)]] of the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake (巳)]] of the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Destruction]] (water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: kisi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

<!--
==
* Yin Water Snake (癸巳) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 sei3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのとみ (mizunoto-mi)
***Onyomi: きかのみ (kika-no-mi)
***Onyomi: きび (kibi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyesa
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

-->
==Years of Yin Water Snake==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that yields a remainder of 33 when divided by 60 is considered a Mizunotomi [[Year|year]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Year of Mizunotomi'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 33|33 AD]]
* [[AD 93|93 AD]]
* [[153|153 AD]]
* [[213|213 AD]]
* [[273|273 AD]]
* [[333|333 AD]]
* [[393|393 AD]]
* [[453|453 AD]]
* [[513|513 AD]]
* [[573|573 AD]]
* [[633|633 AD]]
* [[693|693 AD]]
* [[753|753 AD]]
* [[813|813 AD]]
* [[873|873 AD]]
* [[933|933 AD]]
* [[993|993 AD]]
|
* [[1053|1053 AD]]
* [[1113|1113 AD]]
* [[1173|1173 AD]]
* [[1233|1233 AD]]
* [[1293|1293 AD]]
* [[1353|1353 AD]]
* [[1413|1413 AD]]
* [[1473|1473 AD]]
* [[1533|1533 AD]]
* [[1593|1593 AD]]
* [[1653|1653 AD]]
* [[1713|1713 AD]]
* [[1773|1773 AD]]
* [[1833|1833 AD]]
* [[1893|1893 AD]]
* [[1953|1953 AD]]
|
* [[2013|2013 AD]]
* [[2073 AD]]
* [[22nd century]]
* [[22nd century]]
* [[23rd century]]
* [[24th century]]
* [[24th century]]
* [[2433 AD]]
* [[2493 AD]]
* [[2553 AD]]
* [[2613 AD]]
* [[2673 AD]]
* [[2733 AD]]
* [[2793 AD]]
* [[2853 AD]]
* [[2913 AD]]
* [[2973 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yin Water Snake==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is [[Kanoto (辛)]] or [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the month of [[April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or on the [[Solar term]] (from [[Lixia]] to the day before [[Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).

==Days of Yin Water Snake==
The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows.
===Selected Day===
The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of [[Ten directions]] and the 1st day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].

==Related Topics==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]]
[[zh-yue:丁酉]]

{{translated page|ja|癸巳|version=84123801|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Hahnvi]]
[[de:Yin Water Snake]]

[[ja:癸巳]]
[[zh:癸巳]]
[[ko:계사 (간지)]]
[[fr:Serpent de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Schlange]]

[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Hahneen]]
[[en:Fire Rooster]]
[[fr:Coq de feushak]]
[[it:Ding-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:정유 (간지)]]
[[vi:Đinh Dậu]]
[[za:Dingceij]]
[[zh:丁酉]]
[[ar:Yin Water Snake]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yin Water Snake--><!--Yin Water Snake-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]]
[[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]]
[[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]]
[[hak:Kui-sṳ]]
[[nds:Water-Snaak]]
[[vi:Quý Tỵ]]
[[za:Gveiqceih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]]
[[zh-yue:癸巳]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]]
[[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]]
[[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]]
[[hak:Kui-sṳ]]
[[nds:Water-Snaak]]
[[vi:Quý Tỵ]]
[[za:Gveiqceih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]]
[[zh-yue:癸巳]]
{{wikidata link|Q905297}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
